sharedPost.text:
-Du singst gerne ?
-Du hast Lust, es besser zu können?
-Du möchtest in einen Chor, um gemeinsam mit anderen zu musizieren, traust es Dir aber bislang nicht zu?
-Du hast andere Beweggründe, Dich intensiver mit deiner Stimme zu befassen?

Dann melde Dich!

Ich zeige Dir, wie man eine solide Atem-/Stimmtechnik erarbeitet, wie Du beim Sprechen und Singen mehr Selbstvertrauen gewinnst und gebe Dir peu à peu das Grundwerkzeug an die Hand, Dich stimmlich wohler zu fühlen.

Ich freue mich auf genau Dich!

Eure/ Ihre
Annette Kuhn

items.text: "New Alpha Becoming" is a campaign about deconstructing the idea of men and masculinity. In its center is our protagonist (80 y. o.) and other men in all ages. For this pro bono campaign we are urgently looking for an enthusiastic cellist for our shoot in Berlin. 8. 4. & 10.4. to play during an interview of the protagonist. Apply via pm

items.text:
[NON PROFIT - KRAKÓW]
Witam serdecznie
poszukuję mężczyzny około 26-40 lat do roli biegacza. Film jest realizowany na świetlice filmową.
Pożądane cechy wyglądu- Brunet, szczupła sportowa sylwetka – bardziej wytrenowana bieganiem niż siłownią. Mile widziane, siwizna na skroniach, delikatne zmarszczki mimiczne,  kilkudniowy zarost.

Rola polega na biegnięciu przed siebie w plenerze pośród różnych scenografii [19.04] oraz przeczytaniu krótkiego monologu pod voice over i dodatkowy dzień nagrywek w mieszkaniu [Do ustalenia]

Jeśli pasujesz lub znasz kogoś takiego — napisz priv.

items.text: Join NANI in LA on April 9 & 18!

sharedPost.text:
Since April is my birthday month, celebrate with NANI and me by coming to these screenings in Los Angeles!! Yes!!!

1.NANI 
At the Pasadena Film festival
April 9, 1:30 pm, 
Noho 7 Laemmle Theatre    

 2. NANI 
At the Hollywood Blvd Film Festival 
April 18, 2:15, Let Live Cinema
(This may be NANI’s last day of her global festival run) 

@hbfilmfestival @pasadenafilmfestival @nirv4321 @b.khanfident @roomeen8 @moinky @nanishortfilm @sunita.s.mukhi @highlight

items.text: Please do share our information

sharedPost.text:
🎭✨ BIG NEWS ✨🎭

We’re so excited to announce our brand NEW Transition Year programme in partnership with Ashfield College!

Now you can combine top-class academic learning with professional Musical Theatre training.  The perfect balance of education and creativity with both studio and real, in school academic excellence  💫

🎶 Train in singing, acting & dance
📚 Achieve excellence in your academic studies preparing you for Leaving Cert and beyond 
🌟 Build confidence, skills & lifelong friendships

If you’ve ever dreamed of performing while staying on track academically, this is YOUR moment.

items.text:
OPEN CASTING CALL 🐝🛹
Hi everyone! I’m producing and directing a spec inspired by the brand GOLF. Filming will take place between NYC/NJ on April 14th-15th (additional dates to be explored).

Here are the following roles (non-dialogue):

- COLE (21-29, Male, African-American): A passionate young skater determined to find his place in NYC’s skate scene.

- BEECH (21-29, Male, White): A rebellious, skilled skater known for his energetic performances.

- POPE (21-29, Male, Hispanic/Latino descent): A humorous skater and member of Beech’s crew, initially skeptical of Cole but celebrating his success.

- ARMIEL (21-29, Male, African-American): A free-spirited skater and member of Beech’s crew, always cheering and supporting his friends.

Skateboarding experience is required for all applicants (actors/non-actors). These roles are NYC/NJ-based, non-union, and volunteer opportunities.

If you or someone you know fits these roles, please submit your headshot, acting reel, resume (or skating videos), and email with the subject line: THE PUSH - YOUR NAME.

For more information or questions, message me or email spinmastermedia@gmail.com.

items.text:
‘YOU WON’T HELP ME’ IS BEING ASSESSED FOR AN OFFIE NOMINATION!!!
ONLY ONE WEEK LEFT TO CATCH THIS INCREDIBLY POWERFUL, REAL PLAY!

Hen & Chickens Theatre 12th - 18th April

Ticket links in bio or here -

HEN & CHICKENS THEATRE - https://www.unrestrictedview.co.uk/events/you-wont-help-me/

ALL TICKETS UNDER £15! 🫶🏻

You Won’t Help Me is a 5 star reviewed, critically acclaimed, powerful and unflinching exploration of what happens behind closed doors—and the silence that so often surrounds it.

At its core, the play examines domestic abuse not as a single act of violence, but as a pattern of behaviour: subtle, complex, and often hidden in plain sight. It reveals how control can be mistaken for care, how manipulation can be disguised as love, and how fear can quietly become part of everyday life. What may appear ordinary from the outside can, in reality, be something far more dangerous.

Through the relationship between Sarah and David, and the perspective of the friends around them, the play shines a light on the difficult, often uncomfortable questions many people avoid:

Why don’t we always recognise abuse when we see it?

Why is it so hard to step in?

And why is leaving not always as simple as walking away?

TRIGGER WARNINGS - Domestic violence, coercion, bad language, miscarriage, sexual assault, attempted suicide, physical violence.

See you there!

CAST 

@theflyingscotsmann 

@phoenixbenhamactor 

@fynphoenixx

@sebastianvscott 

@esmepemburysmith 

@jonnymonk800m

ASSISTANT DIRECTOR/STAGE MANAGER - @ermydecarvalho 

FOOTAGE BY - @jason_perryman 

PHOTOS BY - @build.better.stories

items.text:
Musical Theatre Teacher - PQA Haywards Heath
Do you have experience working with children and young people aged 6-18? Do you have a passion for musical theatre and dancing, singing and acting? Are you looking for an opportunity to combine your skills and interests to develop young people in a fun and professional setting? Then PQA Haywards Heath is just the place for you!

Due to the success of our growing academy, The Pauline Quirke Academy of Performing Arts (PQA), a leading provider of weekend performing arts training, is currently recruiting MUSICAL THEATRE TEACHER for their Academy in Haywards Heath on Saturday mornings and/or afternoons. There may also be the opportunity for additional work for the right candidate.

You will need to have a good understanding of practical singing, dance, drama and performance techniques and be able to teach a range of genres which might include Pop, Musical Theatre, Acting Through Song and Musical Theatre on Film. There is also the opportunity to choreograph for PQA's West End Season, book musicals, showcases and live performances.

Ideally, applicants will be able to teach harmonies and choreograph full ensemble numbers to groups of children. Teaching experience would be beneficial but not essential as training and support will be given.

We are searching for fun, engaging and passionate individuals looking to bring lots of exciting and innovative ideas to our Musical Theatre module. If you are passionate about learning, the performing arts and making a positive impact on the lives of young people, we would be delighted to hear from you!

PQA follows safer recruiting. An enhanced DBS on the update service will be required and can be arranged. Applicants must be 18+.

To apply please email your CV with a cover letter explaining why you would be the ideal candidate for this role. Please send these direct to Principal Florence on florence.tingley@pqacademy.com.

We look forward to hearing from you!

🚨 BIG NEWS ALERT! 🚨  
🌟 This is YOUR chance to be part of something extraordinary! 🌟  

I’ve officially joined an inspiring new project under the Forever Entertainment family, and let me tell you—it’s time for BIG change. In a world that’s losing its sense of connection, this American production is here to bring people together to create something meaningful.  

Though I’m new to Forever Entertainment, I’ve never been more convinced of a project’s potential. This is more than just entertainment; it’s a movement. We’re collaborating, creating, and giving people (maybe YOU) the chance to get their names in shining lights. It’s your time to step closer to the spotlight and be part of something much bigger.  

But guess what? Projects like this succeed with the power of US—of YOU. Together, we can make magic happen. Join this unique journey and help us crowdfund a production that the world truly needs right now. Let’s build something unforgettable.  

✨ Ready to leave your mark? Will you take the leap? Drop a 🔥 if you’re with me, and head to the link in bio NOW to get involved! Opportunities like this don’t wait. Let’s shine together.  

#ForeverEntertainment #CrowdfundDreams #LightsCameraAction #AmericanProduction #CollaborateAndCreate 
#BeTheChange 
#ShineTogether 
#FilmCommunity 
#SupportTheArts 
#YourNameInLights

We are looking for one professional hand balancer for a contract in Doha, Qatar 🇶🇦

Performs on canes !

Work in the circus “Cirque Du Liban” at the “Fontana Show” 🎪

Contract period: April 30 – May 31
Rehearsals start from April 20

Conditions:
Salary: $1600 per month (meals not included)
 • accommodation in good apartments, visa, flights, 1–2 days off per week, 1–2 shows per day
1 act in the show (4 minutes)

You must bring your own hand balancing canes 🙌🏻

Strong one-arm balance skills are required ✨

Please send your CV / photos / videos via Telegram or WhatsApp: +38 067 59 123 12

items.previewTitle: Comparative study of Aggression, emotional regulation, impulsiveness & sensation seeking among Drummers and non-Drummers
items.previewDescription: study by Arun Barua, M.Sc. Applied Psychology, Rajabazar Science College, Calcutta University. Supervised by Dr. Ishita Chatterjee Please complete all sections honestly. There are no right or wrong answers. Time required: approximately 15–20 minutes.

sharedPost.text:
**🥁 Calling All Drummers! Be Part of an Exciting Psychological Study 🎵**

Hello! I’m **Arun Barua**, and I am conducting a research study focusing on **drummers and their unique psychological traits**, including aggression, emotional regulation, impulsiveness, and sensation seeking. If you choose to participate, I would be very happy, and your contribution will be extremely helpful for my research.

If you are a drummer 🥁, your participation is especially important, as this study aims to understand how drumming—a powerful and expressive musical activity—relates to emotions and behavior. Non-drummers are also welcome to participate for comparison.

📌 **More details about the study are provided within the Google Form.**

🔒 **Confidentiality Assured:**
All the information you provide will remain strictly confidential and anonymous and will be used only for academic purposes.

📝 **Instructions:**

* There are no right or wrong answers
* Please respond honestly based on your own experiences

🙌 **Voluntary Participation:**
Your participation is completely voluntary, and you may withdraw at any time without any consequences.

✅ **Consent:**
By continuing and submitting the form, you give your informed consent to participate in this study.

Thank you for your valuable time and contribution!

Hello everyone! I am shooting a student film this Friday April 10th and had 2 of my main actors bail. I am looking for 2 male actors, age 18-24. The film is called “X Marks the Pot” and this is the logline: A group of broke friends follow a map to a secret high-stakes poker game, only to be outplayed by an inexperienced kid with nothing to lose.  

If you can help me out please message me immediately or reply on this post! Thank you!

topComments.text: I have 2 male actors for you. Do you still need actors?
If you’d be open to gender-swapping one of the roles, I’d love to be considered! I’m local and available Friday 😊

items.title: Let's welcome our new members!

items.text:
🎅🏻 Father Christmas 🎅🏻
Want to join us as a larger-than-life character? Do you have a desire to bring joy and cheer to families and children nationwide? We want to hear from you! 

Audley End Enchanted Railway began  operating over 60 years ago with a wonderful, magical, miniature railway. As a member of the Audley End Performance Troop, you are a key part of bringing that magic to our visitors. 

Father Christmas Performer: 

Working with a troop of fellow actors with support from our Duty Manager, this role requires the ability to portray the iconic Father Christmas and bring the holiday magic to each and every visitor. 

Job Purpose: 

You’ll be engaging with visitors as a traditional Father Christmas in a provided costume as they travel to see you via our enchanting train ride. 

You will be asked to briefly interact with visitors, which will include handing out presents and having your photo taken.  

Key Responsibilities: 

To deliver a high-quality performance throughout the day. 

Being aware of the importance of your role, maintaining your character at all times while on shift. 

To balance your interactions with visitors, making sure you give equal time to all visitors as you interact with them. 

To maintain a positive and upbeat attitude throughout the duration of your shift. 

Displaying good listening skills, identifying customer needs and responding to them quickly. 

Showing a genuine interest in other people and willingness to help 

Adherence to all Company policies and procedures e.g. timekeeping, absence reporting procedures etc. 

Skills and Qualifications: 

Previous acting experience in panto, theatre or other visitor attraction centres (desirable but not essential). 

Previous experience as Father Christmas (desirable but not essential). 

Able to communicate clearly and confidently with the public. 

Ability to demonstrate good teamwork and co-operation. 

Hours of work: 

This casual contract will start on the 3rd of November 2026 with rehearsals, then we open to the public from the 21st of November until the 24th of December. 

Rate of pay: 

The rate of pay is £22.50 an hour. Pay dates are monthly on or around the 27th of each month. 

Apply Today! 

If you are interested in joining the team at Audley End Enchanted Railway, then please send us your CV - performers@aeer.co.uk 

Job Type: Zero hours contract 

Pay: £22.50 per hour 

Benefits: 

Employee discount 

Free parking 

On-site parking 

Schedule: 

9 hour shift 

Monday to Friday 

Weekend availability 

Work Location: Audley End Enchanted Railway, Saffron Walden, Essex

Expected start date: 03/11/2026

sharedPost.text: Wheel Rocket Productions Ltd is looking for actors interested in musical theatre to join the cast for the premiere of Resolution: The Musical, which will take place at the Halifax Playhouse, February 2027. Rehearsals will take place from September onwards. If you are interested and feel that you can contribute to the first steps for this ambitious project then please get in touch via info@resrocks.com. All the details are now available on our web site resrocks.com/auditions. There are roles for people of all ages and backgrounds. Take a moment to listen to 'You're The One' one of the many great songs that will drive the show along.

items.text:
✨ CASTING CALL – TRIPLE THREAT PERFORMERS ✨

Fairytale Celebrations UK are seeking triple threat performers of East Asian descent for an exciting high-energy tribute act, with nationwide bookings confirmed for Summer 2026.

We are looking for strong performers who excel in:
🎤 Singing
💃 Dance (commercial / K-pop style preferred)
🎭 Performance & audience interaction

📍 Rehearsals: Manchester-based
🚗 Work: Nationwide bookings
💷 Pay: £50–£90 per hour (dependent on event) + paid travel

This is a fantastic opportunity to be part of a professional, high-quality production with a focus on authentic representation and dynamic performance.

To apply, please send:
• Headshot
• Vocal reel
• Dance reel (if available)

📧 info@fairytalecelebrations.co.uk

Join us for a summer of high-energy performances, incredible audiences, and unforgettable experiences ✨

items.text:
Musical Theatre Teacher - PQA Haywards Heath
Do you have experience working with children and young people aged 6-18? Do you have a passion for musical theatre and dancing, singing and acting? Are you looking for an opportunity to combine your skills and interests to develop young people in a fun and professional setting? Then PQA Haywards Heath is just the place for you!

Due to the success of our growing academy, The Pauline Quirke Academy of Performing Arts (PQA), a leading provider of weekend performing arts training, is currently recruiting MUSICAL THEATRE TEACHER for their Academy in Haywards Heath on Saturday mornings and/or afternoons. There may also be the opportunity for additional work for the right candidate.

You will need to have a good understanding of practical singing, dance, drama and performance techniques and be able to teach a range of genres which might include Pop, Musical Theatre, Acting Through Song and Musical Theatre on Film. There is also the opportunity to choreograph for PQA's West End Season, book musicals, showcases and live performances.

Ideally, applicants will be able to teach harmonies and choreograph full ensemble numbers to groups of children. Teaching experience would be beneficial but not essential as training and support will be given.

We are searching for fun, engaging and passionate individuals looking to bring lots of exciting and innovative ideas to our Musical Theatre module. If you are passionate about learning, the performing arts and making a positive impact on the lives of young people, we would be delighted to hear from you!

PQA follows safer recruiting. An enhanced DBS on the update service will be required and can be arranged. Applicants must be 18+.

To apply please email your CV with a cover letter explaining why you would be the ideal candidate for this role. Please send these direct to Principal Florence on florence.tingley@pqacademy.com.

We look forward to hearing from you!

Ich helfe Dir, genau an diesen Dingen zu arbeiten und Du wirst bald sehen, welche Verwandlung,Fortschritt und Entwicklung Du machen wirst, und dies nicht nur im Außen, sondern auch im Innen!

Ich freue mich auf genau Dich!

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 15/2026

DER GEWINNER DES GOLDEN BÄREN 2026 UND HOMMAGE AN EINEN WELTSTAR

Blockbustertechnisch läuft mit der Horrorkomödie READY OR NOT 2 ein Leckerbissen für alle Genrefans an.

Eine feinfühlige Künstlerbiografie präsentiert das Cinema Paradiso in St Pölten mit ITS ALL OVER NOW, JEFF BUCKLEY sowie haben wir den Gewinner der Berlinale im Programm, GELBE BRIEFE.

Sie ist vor allem für ihre Rollen bekannt, reife, empathische und oft elegante Frauencharaktere darzustellen. Wir konnten mit Jasmin Ebraheim über Ihre Arbeit ein ausführliches Gespräch führen. 

In Punkto Musik lassen wir uns inspirieren mit Musik aus Kinofilmen der letzten 80 Jahre.

Mittwoch 8.4.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text:
NOW CASTING — Please Share

We’re casting real people; you, your friends or family who have macular and retinal conditions that affect the center of vision — including Macular Degeneration (Wet or Dry AMD), Diabetic Retinopathy, Stargardt Disease, Central Serous Chorioretinopathy (CSC) and similar diagnoses.

These conditions can lead to Central Vision Loss — when the center of what you’re looking at becomes blurry, distorted, or missing while your peripheral vision stays clearer.

If any of these sound familiar: 

• You have a central blind spot

• You turn your head or look slightly away to see more clearly

• Reading a website feels frustrating, slow, or tiring

We want to hear from you.

Share what reading online is really like with central vision loss.

This is a PAID project for a Non‑Union video shoot.

Fees if booked:

• Zoom session from home: $750

• Live studio session in LA: $750 (LA locals only)

LA locals may be booked for one or both.

There is no cost to take part in this casting.

 Email: cvloss@donnagrossmancasting.com

items.text:
Casting Call for Blackburn College film project (6-minute post-apocalyptic, rom-com short film) 'Big Mistake'
I will be casting for the characters of Mallory (18-30 year old female) and Sam (18-30 year old male) please let me know if there would be anyone interested.

Synopsis: Sam and Mal fall in love surviving chaos together. But moving in together turns their romance into a nonstop, absurd battle of bickering, with fights escalating over everything. So, when a zombie crashes through their front door, will they finally team up, or keep fighting each other?

Filming would take place in Blackburn around Griffin Park for 2/3 days between the 15th and the 26th of April! Please message for more info if you are interested in the role and I can share more about the characters and script.

This project is a college film so is non-profit, although we can discuss covering costs for transportation if needed.

items.text:
WARSZAWA 8.04.2026r.
film fabularny 

Szukam dublera:

- Mężczyzna ok. 35-50 lat, średniego wzrostu (ok. 1,7m) z wysportowaną sylwetką. Ponadto brunet, lekko wpadający w rudy. Mile widziany zarost.

STAWKA 250 zł 

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl

W tytule maila: DUBLER 

Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia. 

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY: Portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe. 

Do zobaczenia na planie!

items.text:
CASTING FOR A SURREALIST DRAMA SHORT FILM!!

DATES: 24th-26th APRIL

ROLE: April (Female, playing age 25-30, black): 

Our protagonist's sister, April acted as a sort of parental figure, "the brave one", to Aria throughout their childhood growing up with neglectful parents. They have shared trauma that has cemented their bond - they were not only sisters but best friends. 

LOGLINE: What begins as a normal conversation on an ordinary day takes an unexpected turn, leaving Aria lost in a world of her own and forced to confront the reality she has been avoiding since a recent tragedy. 

Unpaid, food & travel covered. 

Please email halfcoatproductions@gmail.com with spotlight/showreel!

topComments.text: I'm guessing the location is London because people in London don't tend to know there's a whole world out here!

items.text:
🎬 Zaczynamy produkcję nowego sezonu **Trudnych Spaw** w Polot Media! Szukamy aktorów i aktorek do nowego odcinka.

Proszę o uważne przeczytanie charakterystyki i wieku postaci - zgłoszenia kompletnie niezgodne z rolą nie będą rozpatrywane.

🌍 Zgłoszenia dla osób z **CAŁEJ POLSKI** (zwracamy koszty dojazdu do Wrocławia wg. Naszych stawek oraz zapewniamy nocleg):

**Robert (28-33 lat)**: przystojny, ale niedbający o wygląd. Zmęczony i utrapiony. Wpędza rodzinę w kłopoty przez jego ryzykowne decyzje.

20 scen: 22.04, 23.04 i 24.04

**Piotr (31-35 lat)**: sympatyczny i pomocny gość, przyjaciel Roberta

10 scen: 22.04, 23.04 oraz 24.04

📍Osoby **TYLKO Z WROCŁAWIA**:

**Oliwia (26-30 lat)**: atrakcyjna młoda kobieta, mama i żona, ubiera się wyzywająco

6 scen: 23.04

**Błażej (20-24 lat)**: student, przeciętny, miły, czasem przebiera się za kurczaka by dorobić do studiów

4 sceny: 23.04

**Właściciel Mieszkania (30-60 lat)**

2 sceny: 22.04

**Tajemniczy Mężczyzna (28-45 lat)**

1 scena: 23.04

**Klara (28-45 lat)**: współpracowniczka Darii, fałszywa przyjaciółka

3 sceny: 24.04

💰Płatność gotówką od razu po planie, ceny ustalane w zależności od roli.

Osoby zainteresowane proszę o wysłanie wiadomości o tytule

"Trudne Sprawy, odc. 1367 + IMIĘ postaci" wraz z **aktualnymi** zdjęciami twarzy i sylwetki oraz wideo wizytówką (ok. 1-minutowe nagranie, w którym przedstawiamy się, mówimy o swoim doświadczeniu aktorskim, pasjach i hobby) na maila julia.lisowiec@polotmedia.pl lub w wiadomości prywatnej na Facebooku.

✒️Proszę o kontakt WYŁĄCZNIE osoby dyspozycyjne w podanych terminach, w podanym przedziale wiekowym oraz pochodzącym z odpowiedniej lokalizacji.

Czekam na kontakt!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '開量 TRUDNE TRUDNE SPRAWY SPR AWY'

items.text:
(PAID) CASTING CALL – CATWOMAN FANMADE SHORT FILM (CASTING INTERNATIONALLY TO FILM IN NYC)

An upcoming independent student short film casting for the lead role of Catwoman!! Using a special loan granted and sponsored by our film school.

Producer/Director: Maddi Egan (unfortunately our previous director has had to step away due to family commitments)

Role: Catwoman

Gender: Female

Age Range: 18–25

Ethnicity: Open to all backgrounds

Location: New York City, United States, exact location unknown. As we are casting internationally, flights and hotel accommodation will be covered. If visa coverage / sponsorship is needed, we can sort upon further discussion depending on customs/national law requirements etc

This is a paid role. Transport and catering will be fully covered for all selected talent. 

Pay will be $4,000 USD for 20 hours of filming over two days ($200 an hour), which will be written in a contract (which will also detail accommodations, flights, etc) approved by our professor and given to whoever is successful in the role

We are looking for a confident, expressive performer who can embody Catwoman’s agility, charm, and unpredictability. Prior acting experience is not essential.

If you believe you fit this description, please email Eganmaddi1@gmail.com with your CV, Headshot and Showreel. If you don’t have any of the required materials please feel free to just send an email! 

We would love to welcome student actresses as we are students ourselves. This is an amazing opportunity to work overseas and work with students from a major film school!

Copy of the film, IMDB credits and keeping the catwoman costume is included as additional benefits on top of the pay and other expenses covered. You will also be invited to any film festivals or award ceremonies should this film be completed and successful in winning any awards.

Filming dates will be July 3rd to July 5th, with a rest day in between.

Join us in bringing an iconic character to life in a bold and stylised short film.

**TITLE:** The Stress Fracture

**LOCATION:** Duns, Scotland

**PRODUCTION DATE:** May 4–5, 2026

**PAID, UNPAID OR PROFIT SHARE:** Paid (£150 per day)

**PRODUCER OR PRODUCTION COMPANY:** Tatty Pants Theatre Co.

Tatty Pants Theatre Co. is casting performers for **“The Stress Fracture”** by Ben Ramsay, a new play heading to **DunsPlayFest** as part of their Play Development Series.

**ROLES**

**RACHEL ZIELINSKI**

Female | Mid 20s

• Trade union representative

• Intelligent, grounded, and strong-willed

**YVONNE WISHART**

Female | 40s

• Retail manager

• Disciplinary investigator

• Authoritative with underlying complexity

**Production Details**

• Rehearsals:

– May 4 (12pm–8pm)

– May 5 (10am–late)

• Staged Reading:

– May 5 at 9:15PM

• Location: Volunteer Hall, Duns

• Open to **Scotland-based actors**

• All experience levels encouraged

Apply via **Actors & Extras** as a Talent PRO member with a **1-month FREE trial**:

Please send your performance videos + contact information via private message
WhatsApp: +90 534 040 55

items.text:
✨ CASTING CALL – TRIPLE THREAT PERFORMERS ✨

Fairytale Celebrations UK are seeking triple threat performers of East Asian descent for an exciting high-energy tribute act, with nationwide bookings confirmed for Summer 2026.

We are looking for strong performers who excel in:
🎤 Singing
💃 Dance (commercial / K-pop style preferred)
🎭 Performance & audience interaction

📍 Rehearsals: Manchester-based
🚗 Work: Nationwide bookings
💷 Pay: £50–£90 per hour (dependent on event) + paid travel

This is a fantastic opportunity to be part of a professional, high-quality production with a focus on authentic representation and dynamic performance.

To apply, please send:
• Headshot
• Vocal reel
• Dance reel (if available)

📧 info@fairytalecelebrations.co.uk

Join us for a summer of high-energy performances, incredible audiences, and unforgettable experiences ✨

items.text:
Casting Call:  🎬 PAID ON-SCREEN TALENT NEEDED – BIRMINGHAM

We’re looking for confident on-screen talent to feature in short video content for a small solicitors firm.

📍 Filming in and around Birmingham
💷 £50 flat fee (approx. 4 hours)

You’ll be performing a mix of roles — including client-style scenarios, informational content, and some lighter, more engaging videos.

We’re looking for someone who:

Is natural and confident on camera
Can deliver lines clearly and convincingly
Is reliable and easy to work with

🎭 Showreel required

⭐ Potential for ongoing paid work for the right person

📩 Comment below or DM with your showreel + headshot

topComments.text: As you were told when you posted this elsewhere, you don't pay minimum wage to film an advert for businesses charging high prices. And seeking someone who has to pay to get to Birmingham means finding someone who will be working for nothing.
Available with experience, but you’d have to do something about the money to make it worth it ￼

FINAL PLACES LEFT! 💨
Fundamentals & Repetition, starting April has just  couple of places left. 🏃🏃‍♀️

Come join our community! 🫶

Train for Authenticity, Perform with Power. 🎭🎬

Unleash your authentic self and discover new emotional depths in your performances. The Meisner technique transforms more than just your acting—it transforms you.

Class is limited to 12 students.

Meisner Technique - Intro & Repetition Skills
Book Now @ www.bodymindvoice.co.uk/meisner-intro
�Consent-informed connection and sustainable emotional exploration - unlock your true potential!

📅 Course Details:
* Dates: Wednesdays, 4 pm – 7 pm
* Duration: 29th April - 3rd June
* Location: Marylebone, London
* Class Size: Limited to 12 places for personal attention

🎟️ What’s Included:�✅ Six guided in-person sessions�✅ 1 personalised feedback session�✅ 1 FREE drop-in Actor Training Session for continued practice 🎉

Whether you’re a beginner or an experienced actor looking to refresh your skills, this course will help you tap into deeper dynamics and develop truthful behaviour in your work.

💰 Fees:
* £225 for 20+ hours of training
* £205 each if you bring a friend (save £20 each!) 💥

The Meisner Technique has consistently proven to build truthful, dynamic acting—the glue that ties all disciplines together! 💡 Join us in a fun, supportive environment that fosters genuine connection and growth. 🌱

BOOK NOW: www.bodymindvoice.co.uk/meisner-intro
Or email - mail@lawrencecarmichael.com

🎬 **CASTING CALL – PAID SOCIAL VIDEO PROJECT** (Nottingham)

Hey everyone! Sharing a great opportunity for local actors/content creators working in collaboration with Nottingham City Council 👇

A **“Be Condom Confident” social video series** is currently casting – looking for people comfortable on camera to create natural, conversational content for social media.

💬 Ideal for:
• Actors
• Content creators / TikTokers
• Anyone confident speaking to camera

🎥 These types of projects usually involve short, authentic talking-style videos (often filmed on phones) for social media campaigns

📍 Nottingham based (up to £50 travel allowance)

items.text:
Paid On-Screen Presenter Role - Oxford Based
We’re currently looking for on-screen talent for a new digital content project. Seeking confident presenters / actors (male & female), ideally in their mid-30s to 40s, with a natural and engaging on-camera presence.

This role will involve delivering scripted content in a clear, relatable, and conversational tone. Strong communication skills are essential, with the ability to explain ideas in a way that feels accessible and authentic.

We’re particularly interested in individuals who can balance a calm, trustworthy presence with subtle storytelling ability.Please note:
• This is not a one-person role — we’re looking to work with a small group of presenters over time• Experience in presenting, acting, or public speaking is preferred

• A professional but approachable style is key

• The project centres around real-world, modern-day topics, so an ability to connect with a broad audience is important.

TO APPLY: Please share video examples of you presenting. Self-tape audition may be requested with a provided script snippet. 
[crewing@freshcutvideo.co.uk](mailto:crewing@freshcutvideo.co.uk)

Feel free to share or tag someone who might be a good fit.

Ideally based in Oxford, UK.

topComments.text: Not in Oxford but can do this at my home system
Not based in Oxford but happy to travel. Will send an email :)

IMC Film Production is currently crewing up for an upcoming commercial photoshoot for the brand Descente in the greater New Orleans area. We are looking for experienced local professionals to join our team.

Your attached resume

items.text:
🚨 CASTING A POWERFUL, SEDUCTIVE, NO-HOLDS-BARRED ROLE 🚨
This is not your typical character.

🎬 NON-UNION CASTING – LOS ANGELES LOCAL ONLY

PROJECT: No Safe Word (Psychological Thriller)
SHOOT DATES: April 25–29
RATE: $225/day

ROLE: VIVIAN
Female, late 40s–early 60s, White

Dominant. Magnetic. Unapologetic.

Vivian is a woman who controls every room she walks into. Seductive, intelligent, and emotionally dangerous, she doesn’t believe in love, only power. In flashbacks, she shapes a man’s entire worldview, teaching him that intimacy is control… and vulnerability is weakness.

This is a bold, layered role for an actress unafraid to explore dark psychology, sensuality, and emotional intensity.

THE STORY:
What starts as a luxury healing retreat turns into a psychological trap, where control, desire, and manipulation blur the line between consent and survival.

⚠️ PLEASE NOTE:

Involves simulated intimacy & mature content
Must be comfortable with dark, psychological themes

Los Angeles local hire only

SUBMIT:
📧 NoSafeWordCasting@gmail.com
Include headshot + reel link

 Deadline for submission is 4/13/26

items.text:
Pacific Producers Group & Vancouver Virtual Productions are casting for a 30-second and 15-second TV commercial to be filmed on April 16th in Coquitlam.

**3-4 Year Old Girl (female, 3-5 years old, Caucasian)**
* Positive, energetic, excitable, a winning smile
* Her character is wearing a full bathing suit, wrapped up in a towel over top, and is putting one foot in and out of a small kid-sized inflatable pool in the summer.

**ADDITIONAL DETAILS**
* Compensation: 1x30-sec ad - $750, agency fee included.
* Rights & Terms: a complete buyout for all media in perpetuity
* This is a non-union shoot (no royalties/residuals) and shooting will require a day of the talent’s time – we estimate a 2 to 4 hour day for talent
* Character has no dialogue
* We will be focused on naturalness, energy, and connection to other characters (mom)
* Lunch/food will be provided
* Filming will be indoors, in a studio
* The TV ad is for an outdoor living product, and the script is family-oriented
* Talent will provide their own basic wardrobe, but some character-specific wardrobe items may be supplied by production
* A wardrobe allowance will be added for any personal items used ($25 for basic wardrobe outfit, plus $5 for each additional item)

**AUDITION MATERIAL**

If interested, please email a headshot and resume to duramarket@duradek.com .

You’re also welcome to submit any web links to an online reel, demo, or portfolio of past work. However, we are specifically seeking audition material; these can be self-filmed on a phone or iPhone – with the following requested audition material:

We’d love to see this young actress in playful situations – skipping

rope or playing hopscotch or balancing on one leg, enjoying themselves and laughing.

topComments.text: On lunch break I will email my younger daughter’s resume and headshots! She is a fish in water absolutely loves it can dive down in deep water so totally comfortable around water!
Maria Humphrey

items.text: New Feature Film!! Looking to Minors with their guardians! See how to submit below.

sharedPost.text:
WARNER BROS FEATURE FILM - EXODUS
Work Date: Fitting April 29th, Filming May 5th
Rate: $168/12 + 1/4 check for fitting
Location: Fayetteville, GA (fitting and filming)
Central Casting is now taking submissions for REAL FAMILIES!
Looking for 2 kids, ages 7-11 and female presenting guardian who can portray Caucasian for a family still photo shoot. All 3 must be comfortable being on camera. "Dad" will be one of our actors.
If this is your kids and female presenting guardian is ready to also be on camera, please submit the following:
• Clear recent head shot of each person, 1 photo of the 3 of you together
• DOB of your children
• Clothing sizes
• Full name of guardian & kids
• Phone Number (formatted 000-000-0000)
Send submissions to:
pilot@centralcasting.com
Subject Line: FAMILY PIC

items.text:
Georgia Country Summer Festival 2026 is looking for new talent.

Hosted by Xtreme Dreams Foundation and curated by Family Wealth Moguls, this official talent showcase gives artists the opportunity to take the stage, compete for cash prizes, and be considered for the chance to open for Tae Lewis from The Voice.

We’re looking for:
🎤 Solo Artists
🔥 Groups
💥 Youth Acts

💰 Top 3 artists will win cash prizes

sharedPost.text:
🎤🔥 ARTIST CALL: LIVE TALENT SHOWCASE 🔥🎤

📍 The Colonnade • Ringgold, GA — just outside Chattanooga

Georgia Country Summer Festival 2026 is looking for new talent.

Hosted by Xtreme Dreams Foundation and curated by Family Wealth Moguls, this official talent showcase gives artists the opportunity to take the stage, compete for cash prizes, and be considered for the chance to open for Tae Lewis from The Voice.

We’re looking for:
🎤 Solo Artists
🔥 Groups
💥 Youth Acts

💰 Top 3 artists will win cash prizes 
⭐ Selected artists may have the opportunity to open for Tae Lewis 
⏳ Limited performance slots available

If you’re ready to be seen, heard, and take your talent to the next level, this is your moment.

Submit performance clips and original tracks to:
📩 FamilyWealthMoguls@gmail.com

Serious artists only.

#GACountrySummerFestival #TalentShowcase #ArtistCall #xtremedreamsfoundation #FamilyWealthMoguls

items.text:
🎬 Casting Call – Central London 🎬

We’re currently looking for male or female actors for an upcoming project filming in Central London.

Details:
• 📍 Location: Central London
• 🎭 Roles: Open to all genders
• 💰 Pay: £100 per day (per person)

Requirements:
• Reliable and punctual
• Comfortable on camera
• Previous acting experience is a plus, but not essential

If you’re interested, please send:
• A recent headshot
• Any showreel or previous work (if available)
• Your availability

📩 Apply via DM 

Feel free to share or tag someone who might be interested!

topComments.text: Not being critical but how could anyone say if they were interested or not based on the information given?
What date? Where will the footage be used? What are the roles?

🎬 CAST & CREW SUBMISSIONS – BLOUSE N’ SKIRT (BRIC TV PITCH) PAID NON-UNION NYC
We are currently accepting submissions for CAST 

📩 SUBMIT TO:RedHandedImagery@gmail.com

Include:

Headshot (if applicable)

Resume

Reel or work samples (if available)

Role you're interested in 

⚠️ IMPORTANT NOTE:This project is currently in development and being submitted to the BRIC Media TV Pilot Program.

Advancing into production is contingent upon securing one of the two available pilot slots, which includes funding.

🗓️ Submission deadline: MAY 5th

(EP. 1 “Gentrification”)

items.text:
"Mechanic" for Short Film (20-30y/o)
Looking to cast a mechanic character for a short film. This scene would be shot either May 2 or 3, in a home garage. Should be a half day or less. It would not involve extensive use of tools, and is a pretty short dialogue scene. Bonus points if you have any experience working on cars at all, but not necessary.

Please message me if you're available and interested. This is a paid position located in Colorado Springs.

topComments.text: Location/City?
Please send additional information.

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL — AS THE LIGHT FADES

RDE Films is casting for a psychological crime thriller shooting this June in Colorado.

We’re looking for grounded actors who can live truthfully in heavy, character-driven material.

⸻

ROLES:

[YOUNG PROTAGONIST]
Black Male | 14–18
Quiet. Observant. Carrying more than he should.
Must be able to deliver a strong emotional scene.

⸻

[FATHER FIGURE]
Black Male | 40–60
Strong presence. Controlled. A man of few words.

⸻

[SOUTHERN LOCAL]
Caucasian Male | 30–40
Heavy Southern accent. Blue-collar. Brief physical altercation.

⸻

Send: Headshot, Resume, Reel (if available)
📩 Casting@Rdefilms.com
Subject: ROLE – NAME

Local hires preferred.

items.title: (no title)

items.text:
Hi everyone! We’re casting for the role of *Matt* in a student film.

We’re looking for a male actor in their late 20s to early 30s (playing age). The role is paid at £120 per day (£240 total), travel costs total £30 (for the two days) and includes a kissing scene.

Please note: we’re only considering London-based actors.

email - twylam_shortfilm@tutamail.com

topComments.text: interested please
Interested I’ll email you

items.title: Szukam pracy model / kierowca/ catering / eventy

items.text:
[NON PROFIT - KRAKÓW]
Witam serdecznie,
poszukuję mężczyzny około 26-40 lat do roli biegacza. Film jest realizowany na świetlice filmową.
Pożądane cechy wyglądu- Brunet, szczupła sportowa sylwetka – bardziej wytrenowana bieganiem niż siłownią. Mile widziane, siwizna na skroniach, delikatne zmarszczki mimiczne,  kilkudniowy zarost.

Rola polega na biegnięciu przed siebie w plenerze pośród różnych scenografii [19.04] oraz przeczytaniu krótkiego monologu pod voice over i dodatkowy dzień nagrywek w mieszkaniu [Do ustalenia]

Jeśli pasujesz lub znasz kogoś takiego — napisz priv.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of road

topComments.text: Priv Messenger

Witam. Wydaję mi się że pasował bym do tej scenerii, pojawia się błąd przy wysylaniu priv. 
Pozdrawiam

items.text:
INNOVAID søger 2 drenge og 2 piger i alderen 4 - 6 år
Vi søger 2 drenge og piger i alderen 4 - 6 år som medvirkede til optagelse af reklamevideo og billeder til et nyt spændende legetøjskoncept som vi lancerer.

Børnene skal lege med legetøjet, og der vil ikke indgå lysoptagelæser/ replikker.

 

Optagelserne vil foregå i Skødstrup nord for Aarhus – torsdag d. 9. april kl. 14 - 16 eller søndag d.1. april kl. 10 - 12.

Det er ulønnet, vi tilbyder dog en mindre gave i forbindelse med deltagelse i optagelserne.

Skriv pb hvis du er interesseret!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Vi soger: To piger og to drenge i alderen 4 4- 4-6ảr 6 år LOGGOS_- LOGGOS INNOVAID*'

sharedPost.text:
Noch ein paar Schritte, dann …

Es ist immer wieder schön zu erleben. Ich sitze im Studio mit nichts, und nach einigen Stunden Kann ich ein Musikstück präsentieren. Ich habe komponiert, getextet ,produziert und gesungen. Das gibt mir persönlich sehr viel. Ich mache das in erster Linie für mich. Wer gefallen dran findet, soll teilhaben, kann auch streamen auf allen Plattformen weltweit. Ich finde es Top. 
Ich hatte vor einigen Tagen ein Post geteilt, der vieles von mir beschreibt. Ich werde mich von Menschen trennen die mir nicht gut tun . Sie gehören nicht in mein Leben. Munter bleiben!

items.text:
🎅🏻 Father Christmas 🎅🏻
Want to join us as a larger-than-life character? Do you have a desire to bring joy and cheer to families and children nationwide? We want to hear from you! 

Audley End Enchanted Railway began  operating over 60 years ago with a wonderful, magical, miniature railway. As a member of the Audley End Performance Troop, you are a key part of bringing that magic to our visitors. 

Father Christmas Performer: 

Working with a troop of fellow actors with support from our Duty Manager, this role requires the ability to portray the iconic Father Christmas and bring the holiday magic to each and every visitor. 

Job Purpose: 

You’ll be engaging with visitors as a traditional Father Christmas in a provided costume as they travel to see you via our enchanting train ride. 

You will be asked to briefly interact with visitors, which will include handing out presents and having your photo taken.  

Key Responsibilities: 

To deliver a high-quality performance throughout the day. 

Being aware of the importance of your role, maintaining your character at all times while on shift. 

To balance your interactions with visitors, making sure you give equal time to all visitors as you interact with them. 

To maintain a positive and upbeat attitude throughout the duration of your shift. 

Displaying good listening skills, identifying customer needs and responding to them quickly. 

Showing a genuine interest in other people and willingness to help 

Adherence to all Company policies and procedures e.g. timekeeping, absence reporting procedures etc. 

Skills and Qualifications: 

Previous acting experience in panto, theatre or other visitor attraction centres (desirable but not essential). 

Previous experience as Father Christmas (desirable but not essential). 

Able to communicate clearly and confidently with the public. 

Ability to demonstrate good teamwork and co-operation. 

Hours of work: 

This casual contract will start on the 3rd of November 2026 with rehearsals, then we open to the public from the 21st of November until the 24th of December. 

Rate of pay: 

The rate of pay is £22.50 an hour. Pay dates are monthly on or around the 27th of each month. 

Apply Today! 

If you are interested in joining the team at Audley End Enchanted Railway, then please send us your CV: performers@aeer.co.uk

Job Type: Zero hours contract 

Pay: £22.50 per hour 

Benefits: 

Employee discount 

Free parking 

On-site parking 

Schedule: 

9 hour shift 

Monday to Friday 

Weekend availability 

Work Location: Audley End Enchanted Railway, Saffron Walden, Essex

Expected start date: 03/11/2026

items.text:
We are now casting  for our touring  Summer  show Bring Mer Sunshine.

The show is a musical  show featuring songs from around the world La Bamba, Viva Espana, Come Fly With Me,. Summer Holiday ,  Sway , and many more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 25th  -29th May

Playing Dates- 1st June -31st July

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are looking for drivers with cars only .

We are looking for performers on all area of the UK -please include bases when sending details.

We are offering 700.00 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel to [info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk](mailto:info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk)

items.text:
**Casting: LA area locals.  ****Seeking families and friends to be contestants on a fun, family friendly game show.  **

A major brand is currently looking for fun, outgoing and excitable families and friends to be contestants on a gameshow shooting 30 minutes outside of downtown Los Angeles. 

 All teams must be able to self-report to the location and be available on May 4th and potentially May 5th.

Teams must consist of at least two people and no more than five.  All scenarios are welcome. Families with children between 6 to 12 years old are encouraged to apply.  Participants will be eligible to win various prizes.

To submit, please email a note about your team along with a photo of everyone on the team as well as a telephone number and email address so we can reach out to you to make a brief 1-to-2-minute audition tape.  

Please email [ ](mailto:drivethrusurprise@gmail.com)[factcasting@gmail.com](mailto:factcasting@gmail.com)

items.text:
**Casting Call: Female Actors (20-30) – Sisters**

Looking for **two female actors, ages 20-30**, to play sisters in a **small scene** for my **directing class final**. No experience needed—this is a **fun, low-pressure way to try acting** and **get **on-set** experience**.

Perfect for anyone who wants a **small role to add to their portfolio**! The scene is **short and simple**, focusing on the sisters’ interaction.

**Date:** Needed **this Friday**
**Location:** Emily Carr University of Art and Design

Email ochenderson@hotmail.com if you’re interested. **All levels welcome. Thank you!**

items.text:
**Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy mężczyzn i kobiet ( Gliwice/Katowice )**

 

Szukamy skarbu Zakonu Templariuszy z 1307 roku!

 

Jesteśmy grupą pasjonatów składającą się z osób z różnym doświadczeniem filmowym i miejscem zamieszkania. Spotykamy się 1 2 razy w miesiącu na sesjach testowych i video w wybrane niedziele, ustalane 1 2 tygodnie wcześniej. Projekt realizujemy na terenie Gliwic.

** **

**Kolejne nasze spotkanie to 12.04.26 i 19.04.26 ( Niedziela )   godz. 10:30 - 15:00**

 

Nasza Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’ **poszukuje chętną osobę do projektu niekomercyjnego mini serialu osadzonego głównie w 1940 roku. Najlepiej jakby takie osoby były  ** z Gliwic lub okolic, Zabrza czy Katowice najdalej.**

 

1 – Rycerz Zakonu Templariuszy wiek: 40 – 50 z zarostem, kwestie po francusku

2 – Ojciec głównej bohaterki ‘’Antoni’’ ( Polak ) wiek: 35 – 40, kilka odcinków kwestie po Polsku

3 – Podoficer niemiecki Waffen SS ( Niemiec ) wiek: 25 – 40, bez zarostu, kwestie po niemiecku

4 – Zastępczyni szefa Ahnenerbe ( Niemka ) wiek: 25 – 30, kilka odcinków, kwestie po Niemiecku

5 – Oficer francuski wiek: 25 – 40 bez zarostu, 1 scena kwestie po francusku

6 – Wujek głównej bohaterki ‘’Leon’’( Polak ) wiek: 40 – 45, kilka odcinków, kwestie po Polsku

7 – Niemiecki żołnierz wiek: 20 – 40 bez zarostu, 2 odcinki kwestie po niemiecku

8 – Niemiecki żandarm wiek: 25 – 40 bez zarostu, kwestie po niemiecku, 2 odcinki

** **

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
🔥💇‍♀️ „OSTRE CIĘCIE” POSZUKUJE SALONÓW DO TOTALNEJ METAMORFOZY!

Prowadzisz salon fryzjerski i czujesz, że czas na radykalną zmianę?

Chcesz, by Twoje miejsce zachwycało wnętrzem, wyposażeniem i zespołem pełnym pewności siebie?

Program „OSTRE CIĘCIE” daje Ci szansę na spektakularną metamorfozę:

od podłogi po sufit, z udziałem ekspertów, stylistów i partnerów programu.

Co możesz zyskać?

✨ nowoczesne, przyciągające uwagę wnętrze
✨ funkcjonalne i stylowe wyposażenie salonu
✨ profesjonalne szkolenia dla zespołu
✨ wsparcie ekspertów i dodatki od sponsorów programu

📌 CASTING TRWA!

Wyślij kilka słów o swoim salonie oraz numer telefonu:

📩 PRIV
📩 casting@przestertv.pl
📞 Kontakt: 690 744 311

Daj się zauważyć. Daj się odmienić. Do zobaczenia na castingu!

items.text:
**JELENIA GÓRA / SZKLARSKA PORĘBA i okolice**

**Plan zdjęciowy w JESTED,** **CZECHY**

**Transport z Jeleniej Góry i Szklarskiej Poręby do JESTED **

**14 i/lub 15 kwietnia**

Szukam Statystów, **mężczyzn ok.18-50 lat **na plan biograficznego filmu fabularnego o znanym Polaku pod roboczym tytułem "Kosmonauta".

Panowie w charakterze TECHNIKÓW / WOJSKOWYCH - wiek ok. 20-50 lat.

Można zgłosić się również na 1 z podanych dni.

Przed zdjęciami, prawdopodobnie 13 kwietnia – strzyżenie panów jeśli będzie taka potrzeba - to do potwierdzenia jeszcze.

**Stawka: 140 zł za dzień zdjęciowy + jednorazowo 60 zł dodatkowo za charakteryzację czyli strzyżenie o ile w innym dniu zdjęciowym niż plan**

**Ponieważ gramy lata 70te mamy wytyczne charakteryzacji:**

- WŁOSY- raczej dłuższe, nachodzące na uszy i kark. Nieakceptowane są włosy obcięte bardzo krótko maszynką, wygolone boki i kark

- ZAROST – brak, ogoleni na gładko. 

Wyborów dokonuje reżyser na podstawie zdjęć.

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **JCZ 14/15**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość + wymiary: wzrost, rozmiar ubrania i buta

W załączniku: **ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + zdjęcie z profilu + aktualne ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI**

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI – aktualne, cała sylwetka

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text

items.text:
CASTING CALL (Paid): Celebrating Scotland - User Generated Content (UGC) / Existing Video
We are working on an exciting campaign for Bank of Scotland, with Raw Research who are looking for real people from all over Scotland to be part of it. The campaign will be made using real moments filmed on customers’ phones - videos already sitting on your camera rolls and memory cards! We’re looking for authentic clips that celebrate the real Scotland - the big moments, the tough ones, the wins and the everyday. People from all over Scotland backing themselves, taking chances, and showing up for each other.

If your clip is selected for the final edit, you’ll be paid £200. Please note: Everyone who submits clips must be a customer of Bank of Scotland.

We’re looking for a real range of moments - including but not limited to:
- ⁠Milestones: getting keys to first house or business, getting engaged / married, passing a driving test, going through IVF / pregnancy
- ⁠Adventures: mountain climbing, wild swimming, holidays, Sunday league or sports club wins and losses
- Memorable Days: getting a tattoo, jumping out of a plane, running a marathon or 5k, bringing a baby home, seeing their first steps
- Typical Days: spending time with friends, doing a TikTok trend, going to the gym, cooking at home, walks (in all weathers)
- ⁠Community / Friend Moments: choirs, gigs, street parties, qualifying for the World Cup!

The campaign will run across Scotland for one year on social media and online, and potentially on TV and billboards. Nothing will be used without your permission, and any unused videos will be permanently deleted. We’ll update everyone either way.

If you have videos that might work, please fill out this casting questionnaire and someone from the team will follow up: https://forms.gle/ULdGkdeFagrqQBZJ6

Alternatively, please email casting@rawresearch.co.uk with SCOTLAND in the subject line to find out more.

Also please feel free to tag or share this with anyone you think might want to be part of this celebration of Scottish life.

topComments.text: What about mountain biking?

items.text:
🚨 CASTING A POWERFUL, SEDUCTIVE, NO-HOLDS-BARRED ROLE 🚨
This is not your typical character.

🎬 NON-UNION CASTING – LOS ANGELES LOCAL ONLY

PROJECT: No Safe Word (Psychological Thriller)
SHOOT DATES: April 25–29
RATE: $225/day

ROLE: VIVIAN
Female, late 40s–early 60s, White

Dominant. Magnetic. Unapologetic.

Vivian is a woman who controls every room she walks into. Seductive, intelligent, and emotionally dangerous, she doesn’t believe in love, only power. In flashbacks, she shapes a man’s entire worldview, teaching him that intimacy is control… and vulnerability is weakness.

This is a bold, layered role for an actress unafraid to explore dark psychology, sensuality, and emotional intensity.

THE STORY:
What starts as a luxury healing retreat turns into a psychological trap, where control, desire, and manipulation blur the line between consent and survival.

⚠️ PLEASE NOTE:

Involves simulated intimacy & mature content
Must be comfortable with dark, psychological themes

Los Angeles local hire only

SUBMIT:
📧 NoSafeWordCasting@gmail.com
Include headshot + reel link

 Deadline for submission is 4/13/26

We’re thrilled to welcome Ember Productions to the academy on Sunday, 19th April 🎬

They are currently on the lookout for talented Make-Up Artists (MUAs) to join their creative team. This is a fantastic chance to come along, get involved, and showcase your skills in a live setting!

Take part in a hands-on photoshoot, working with cast members from the N.E.S.T Project, a great opportunity to build your portfolio and gain real industry experience.

Plus, there are additional roles available in production design, so if you’re interested in working behind the scenes, this could be perfect for you too!

Interested?

items.text:
**🎬 [CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM | LONDON]**

Hi everyone!

I’m currently casting for a **5 - 7 minute psychological drama short film**.

This project is a **director’s showcase piece** for film school application (NFTS), focused on atmosphere, emotion, and visual storytelling with minimal dialogue.

**SAYSORRY.ME**

The story follows a man trying to reconnect with someone he loves - but something feels wrong. The film explores **loss, regret, and the illusion of communication** in a quiet, intimate, and unsettling way.

The tone is grounded and realistic, with subtle psychological tension.

## **🎬 PROJECT PURPOSE **
* Director portfolio / film school submission
* Strong focus on performance, sound design, and visual storytelling
* Intended as a high-quality cinematic short

## **🎭 ROLES**
1. **LEAD (Male, 20-35)**
* Emotional, expressive through subtle acting
* Strong ability to perform with minimal dialogue
* Must carry the film

1. **PARTNER (Any gender, 20-35)**
* Emotional, expressive through subtle acting
* Strong ability to perform with minimal dialogue
* Must carry the film

1. **PRESENTER (Female, 20-35)**
* Commercial-style performance
* Confident, warm, slightly “too perfect” tone
* Ability to speak directly to camera

## **📍**LOCATION 
* London, Battersea Power 

## **📅 SHOOT DETAILS** 
* Shoot date: TBC (mid-April)
* Casting deadline: **20th April (URGENT)**

## **💸 COMPENSATION **
* **Unpaid project**
* Travel (London zones) covered
* Food & drinks provided during the shoot
* Film credit + material for showreel

## **📩 TO APPLY **

Self-tape required for all roles.

Please DM or apply via StarNow [https://www.starnow.com/casting/saysorrycom-3141318/](https://www.starnow.com/casting/saysorrycom-3141318/)

items.text:
SØGER STATISTER PÅ 7-9 år🎥

📆Dato: 24/3 - 2026

⏰Tid: kl. 14.30 - 16.15ish

🏘️Sted: Rollespilshytten Hareskov, Ballerupvej 93, 3500 Værløse 👕'Kostume': Almindeligt tøj til vejret - vi har låne spejder tørklæder

Lidt om hvad og hvorfor:🌻Projekt 'Sammen om fritid' har til formål at oplyse om, hvordan fritidstilbud i Danmark med få greb bedre kan inkludere flere, der lever med usynlig handicap. Som en del af det er vi lige nu i gang med at lave nogle små film, der skal være med til at vise hvad de aktivitetsansvarlige i fritidstilbuddene konkret kan gøre.

🌳En af vores film tager udgangspunkt i en spejderkontekst. Vi har vores 8-årige hovedperson, MEN vi mangler nogle statister, der kan spille hans holdkammerater i spejdergruppen. Det kræver ikke man har spejdererfaringer, men man skal være frisk på at indgå i et par meget simple scener, hvor man sidder og er igang med at snitte i en pind, og så bliver bedt om at rejse sig og mødes et andet sted. 

Selve filmen har et budskab om, at det er vigtigt at gøre indholdet fleksibelt, så flere kan være med på deres både. 

Filmen bliver kun ca. 1,5 minut lang i sidste ende, og kommer til at ligge på hjemmesiden www.sammenomfritid.dk (lanceres først d. 1/5) samt på diverse SoMe-kanaler.

👉Hvis du har spørgsmål eller vil melde dit barn til, så skriv til mig på mma@videnomhandicap.dk

items.text: INNOVAID søger 2 drenge og 2 piger i alderen 4 - 6 år

sharedPost.text:
INNOVAID søger 2 drenge og 2 piger i alderen 4 - 6 år 

Vi søger 2 drenge og piger i alderen 4 - 6 år som medvirkede til optagelse af reklamevideo og billeder til et nyt spændende legetøjskoncept som vi lancerer.
Børnene skal lege med legetøjet, og der vil ikke indgå lysoptagelæser/ replikker.

Optagelserne vil foregå i Skødstrup nord for Aarhus – torsdag d. 9. april kl. 14 - 16 eller søndag d.12. april kl. 10 - 12. 
Det er ulønnet, vi tilbyder dog en mindre gave i forbindelse med deltagelse i optagelserne.
Skriv pb hvis du er interesseret!

items.text:
## Jurij Alschitz introduces QUANTUM PEDAGOGY for Theatre - The Actor in Superposition

World Theatre Training Institute Akt-Zent

A two-day seminar for **actors**, **directors**, and **teachers** who feel that linear thinking no longer corresponds to contemporary creative processes, and who are seeking a different way of working with knowledge, presence, and responsibility.

*For many years I have worked as a teacher and trainer, and increasingly I feel that classical models no longer explain what truly occurs between teacher, student, and the learning process itself. Quantum training is my personal field of reflection and practice — an attempt to reconsider knowledge, the lesson, training, and the responsibility of the teacher.*
*This seminar does not offer answers. It offers a change of position and an experience that each participant undergoes in their own way.*
*Dr. Jurij Alschitz*

items.text:
THE MEETING
A gripping and imaginative drama that stages a fictional encounter between two of the most influential leaders of the Civil Rights Movement: Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and Malcolm X. Set in a Harlem hotel room in 1965, the play brings these towering figures together for an intense, intimate, and deeply human conversation about justice, strategy, and the future of Black America.April 17th to May 3rd

The time has finally come everyone! As of 3-10-2026 'Gloria' (a feature film based on a real couple from El Paso, Texas in the 1930's) is available to rent or buy on Amazon Prime. This film was completely shot in El Paso, Texas.  Also available for DVD purchase on Amazon. 🎥🙂
Feel free to share and post on your social media pages to spread the word. If you would like to be part of our social media campaign feel free to send a direct message to our Gloria Instagram page viewing the film along with the names of those you'd like us to tag. You'll then see your picture or video pop up on our The Gloria Movie     Facebook page and Gloria Instagram page. 😊🎬 We have arrived to share with the public. Thank you Amazon Prime! 🙏🎬🎉🙌�

**LOCATION:** UK-wide (Touring)
**PRODUCTION DATE:** Rehearsals May 25–29 | Tour June 1 – July 31, 2026
**PAID:** £700/week + fuel + accommodation allowance
**PRODUCER:** The Entertainment Providers
**HOW TO APPLY:** Visit [https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls](https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls)

🎭 **ROLE**

**PERFORMER (Solo Show)**
Male or Female | Experienced Vocalist

• Strong vocals + engaging stage presence
• Confident performing solo (one-person show)
• Energetic, charismatic, adaptable
• Passion for live/community performance

• Touring Monday–Friday across the UK
• 2 x 60-minute shows per day
• Must be a **driver with own car**
• Open UK-wide (include location when applying)

💼 **PAY**

• £700 per week
• Fuel covered
• Accommodation allowance provided

You Won’t Help Me is a 5 star reviewed, critically acclaimed, powerful and unflinching exploration of what happens behind closed doors—and the silence that so often surrounds it.

At its core, the play examines domestic abuse not as a single act of violence, but as a pattern of behaviour: subtle, complex, and often hidden in plain sight. It reveals how control can be mistaken for care, how manipulation can be disguised as love, and how fear can quietly become part of everyday life. What may appear ordinary from the outside can, in reality, be something far more dangerous.

Through the relationship between Sarah and David, and the perspective of the friends around them, the play shines a light on the difficult, often uncomfortable questions many people avoid:

Why don’t we always recognise abuse when we see it?

Why is it so hard to step in?

And why is leaving not always as simple as walking away?

TRIGGER WARNINGS - Domestic violence, coercion, bad language, miscarriage, sexual assault, attempted suicide, physical violence.

See you there!

items.text:
For my bachelor graduation film at Salzburg University of Applied Sciences (FH Salzburg), I am looking for the second lead actor for the short film “Head Over Heels”.
Head Over Heels is a stylized 80s slasher short film about a complicated father-son relationship, combining classic horror with psychological tension.
CHUCK
Gender: Male
Playing age: 14–18
Role: Second lead
Language: English (American accent required)
Shooting days: Multiple days (major role)
Description
Chuck is Charles’ son and the unwilling partner in his father’s magic shows and petty thefts. Intelligent, cynical, and emotionally exhausted by their life.
He loves his father but is slowly losing respect for him. Chuck sees reality more clearly than Charles: their life is unstable, dangerous, and offers little future.
His frustration often appears as sarcasm and emotional distance. Beneath that exterior, however, is a vulnerable teenager who simply longs for stability and a normal life.
The role requires a strong emotional range, from dry irony to intense desperation.

Synopsis
Charles and his son Chuck make a living through a combination of magic shows and petty theft. When they accept an invitation to perform at a birthday party, the job initially seems harmless. However, the hosts begin to behave strangely. Soon they discover that the seemingly friendly postman they met earlier has a deeply disturbed idea of family and has chosen Charles to become his new father. What started as a simple gig turns into a deadly game.

Project Information
Title: Head Over Heels
Genre: 80s Slasher Horror
Format: Short Film / Bachelor Graduation Film
Location: Ebreichsdorf, Austria
Shooting Period: June 15 – June 21, 2026
Producer: Florian Peter
Director: Vanessa Brshanca
Language: The film will be performed in English. All actors must be fluent in English and able to perform with a convincing American accent.

items.text:
CASTING CALL

Für unsere Independent-Webserie "Trag Mich" sind wir noch auf der Suche nach einem Hauptdarsteller im Raum Stuttgart.

Zum Projekt:

Die Webserie umfasst fünf Folgen à 20 Minuten und handelt von einer Stuttgarter Freundesgruppe Anfang zwanzig, die den Verlust eines gemeinsamen Freundes durch Suizid verarbeiten muss. Dabei geraten die Figuren in intensive Gespräche über Schuld und Verantwortung.

Zu besetzen ist die Rolle „Constantin“:

Groß, sportlich, kurze Haare, tiefe Stimme, engagiert und politisch organisiert. Ein Charakter, der lieber handelt, als über seine Gefühle zu sprechen. Das fällt ihm besonders schwer, seit seine kleine Schwester Suizid begangen hat.

Bewerbungen an tragmichkontakt@gmail.com

SHOWREELS UND INFOS an tragmichkontakt@gmail.com"

🎬 **CASTING – UGC-VIDEODREH (IMMO 4.0 GmbH)**

📍 **Drehort:** Heidelberg (Start: Langer Anger 38 – Firmensitz IMMO 4.0 GmbH)
🗓️ **Datum:** Freitag, 27.03.
⏱️ **Dauer:** max. 3 Stunden

🎯 Projekt

Für einen UGC-Videodreh (20 Reels à 40–60 Sekunden) suchen wir einen passenden Schauspieler.
Die Texte werden **vorgesprochen (Teleprompter vorhanden)** – kein Auswendiglernen notwendig.

Gedreht wird an **1–2 Immobilien in Heidelberg** (gemeinsame Anfahrt vom Büro).

👤 **Gesuchtes Profil**
* Mann, **30–40 Jahre**
* Gepflegtes, **seriöses Erscheinungsbild**
* Typ: **junger, gehobener Geschäftsmann**
* Stil: **Business / Business Casual**
* Natürliches, authentisches Auftreten vor der Kamera
* Deutschsprachig (akzentfrei)

💸 **Vergütung**
* **500 € pauschal**
* **inkl. aller Nebenkosten & MwSt.**

📩 **Bewerbung**

Bitte **ausschließlich per WhatsApp** an unseren Videografen:

**Luca Falk, Nummer: 01792014052**

👉 Gewünscht:
* kurzes **Bewerbungsvideo**
* aktuelle **Bilder**

Wir freuen uns auf passende Bewerbungen! 🚀

items.summary:
🎬 **CASTING – UGC-VIDEODREH (IMMO 4.0 GmbH)**

📍 **Drehort:** Heidelberg (Start: Langer Anger 38 – Firmensitz IMMO 4.0 GmbH)
🗓️ **Datum:** Freitag, 27.03.
⏱️ **Dauer:** max. 3 Stunden

🎯 Projekt

Für einen UGC-Videodreh (20 Reels à 40–60 Sekunden) suchen wir einen passenden Schauspieler.
Die Texte werden **vorgesprochen (Teleprompter vorhanden)** – kein Auswendiglernen notwendig.

Gedreht wird an **1–2 Immobilien in Heidelberg** (gemeinsame Anfahrt vom Büro).

👤 **Gesuchtes Profil**
* Mann, **30–40 Jahre**
* Gepflegtes, **seriöses Erscheinungsbild**
* Typ: **junger, gehobener Geschäftsmann**
* Stil: **Business / Business Casual**
* Natürliches, authentisches Auftreten vor der Kamera
* Deutschsprachig (akzentfrei)

💸 **Vergütung**
* **500 € pauschal**
* **inkl. aller Nebenkosten & MwSt.**

📩 **Bewerbung**

Bitte **ausschließlich per WhatsApp** an unseren Videografen:

**Luca Falk, Nummer: 01792014052**

👉 Gewünscht:
* kurzes **Bewerbungsvideo**
* aktuelle **Bilder**

Wir freuen uns auf passende Bewerbungen! 🚀

items.title: Hi everyone and thanks for accepting me.

sharedPost.text:
**CASTING CALL**

  We at Ember Production are looking for some SA’s the next shooting day for The Eight Saga: NEST Project in on Saturday the 25th of April and filming in Ambleside in the Lake District.

  This is a one day shoot and we are looking for the following-

1 x Barmen 50’s +

25 x Farmer Boys and a few Farmer Girls any age 

These are non speaking roles and IMDb credits are given and a massive opportunity to be given lots of time in front on the camera to be part of this amazing project.

  To all that are interested please send me a message on my WhatsApp on 07894943405 with your full name, age, email address & headshot please 🙏🏼 

P.s it can just be a picture that you have taken on your phone with no hats or shades on please 🙏🏼 

We are very excited for having you on board and working with you 🫶🏼🫶🏼

  Below is the trailer for this feature film 🎥🎥🎬🎬🔥

🎬 CASTING CALL – SHORT HORROR FILM (SUNDERLAND)•
📍 Location: Sunderland (Silksworth sports complex & park)• 

🎥 Project: The Face (Supernatural horror)• 

⏱ Length: ~4 minutes• 🗓 Shoot: One afternoon (this Saturday)• 💰 Pay: £50 (half day)• 

🚗 Travel: Provided from Sunderland city centre

🎭 Roles Available (2x Female, 20s):

• Jenny – stubborn, determined, refuses to give up even when lost

• Hannah – her friend, frustrated and disillusioned

Write to contact@nineelderproductions.com

📍 Location: Sunderland (Silksworth sports complex & park)• 

🎥 Project: The Face (Supernatural horror)• 

⏱ Length: ~4 minutes• 🗓 Shoot: One afternoon (this Saturday)• 💰 Pay: £50 (half day)• 

🚗 Travel: Provided from Sunderland city centre

🎭 Roles Available (2x Female, 20s):

• Jenny – stubborn, determined, refuses to give up even when lost

• Hannah – her friend, frustrated and disillusioned

Write to contact@nineelderproductions.com

items.text:
Casting Call for a student short film that I am filming next week. Relevant information is included as attached. 

If you have any questions, or if you are interested, please email me at Osworld.media@gmail.com and provide a headshot and/or small showreel, and I shall provide a copy of the script and discuss futher with you.

I am looking for a male and female aged 30+ to play the roles of the mother and father of my protagonist. The parents are featured in two scenes in the film, totalling to approximately 3-4 minutes of sceen time.

Please respond as soon as you can if you are interested, as filming will take place on either Sunday 12th April or Monday 13th April, depending on what is most convenient

Many thanks

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – HOUSTON AREA TALENT NEEDED 🎬

Excited to share a new feature film opportunity in Houston for Sabotaged in Ink by Qui Point Productions!

We are currently casting and hiring crew for the following roles:

✨ CAST ROLES:
• 6 Party Guests
• 7 Coffee Shop Patrons
• 2 Boardroom Employees
• 1 Attacker

🎥 CREW POSITIONS:
• Set Designer
• Script Supervisor
• 3–4 Production Assistants (PAs)
• Wardrobe Designer

📍 Filming Location: Houston, TX
📩 To Submit: Send your headshot and resume to sabotaged26@gmail.com
⏳ Deadline: April 25, 2026

Whether you’re an experienced actor, aspiring extra, or film crew professional, this is a great chance to be part of an exciting feature film production!

Tag someone who should apply! #HoustonCasting #CastingCallHouston #SabotagedInInk #FilmOpportunity #HoustonActors
